summary: Tested booking request flow features for AnyWork UK marketplace (no payment processing, Vinted-style direct payments). All backend API tests pass (16/16). UI testing verified booking creation, helper dashboard with accept/decline, and mobile responsiveness. Fixed auth loading bug in DashboardPage that caused redirect loops.

bug_fixed.description: DashboardPage was redirecting to login before auth context finished loading. Added authLoading check to prevent premature redirect.
bug_fixed.fix: Added authLoading from useAuth() hook and conditional check in useEffect to wait for auth to complete before checking isAuthenticated

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/bookings requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/bookings creates pending booking successfully (200)
Backend: POST /api/bookings accepts bank_transfer payment preference
Backend: GET /api/bookings returns customer's bookings
Backend: GET /api/bookings/helper requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/bookings/helper returns empty for non-helper
Backend: PUT /api/bookings/{id}/status requires authentication (401)
Backend: PUT /api/bookings/{id}/status returns 404 for invalid booking
Backend: PUT /api/bookings/{id}/status returns 400 for invalid status
Backend: Customer can cancel their own booking
Backend: Valid status 'pending' accepted
Backend: Valid status 'confirmed' accepted
Backend: Valid status 'declined' accepted
Backend: Valid status 'completed' accepted
Backend: API root accessible
Backend: Booking creation triggers MOCKED email notification
Frontend: Homepage loads correctly at desktop and mobile widths
Frontend: Browse Helpers page shows helper cards
Frontend: BookingRequestPage has all form elements (date, time, duration, payment options, notes, disclaimer)
Frontend: Booking form submission creates pending booking with success message
Frontend: Customer Dashboard shows My Bookings tab with booking statuses
Frontend: Helper Dashboard shows Booking Requests tab with pending count badge
Frontend: Helper can see booking details (customer name, date, time, duration, payment preference, notes)
Frontend: Accept Booking button works and shows toast confirmation
Frontend: Decline button available for pending bookings
Frontend: Mobile responsive - homepage renders correctly at 390px
Frontend: Mobile responsive - booking page form elements visible and usable at 390px
seed_data_creation: Created testhelper@test.com user with helper profile (helper_489b1f4c8359) and booking for testing accept/decline flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Booking request flow complete: Customer creates booking (pending) -> Helper sees in Booking Requests tab -> Accept changes to confirmed, Decline changes to declined. Email notifications are MOCKED (logged with [EMAIL MOCKED] prefix). Fixed auth loading bug in DashboardPage - now properly waits for auth context before checking authentication.

mocked_apis.email_service: MOCKED - Emails logged with '[EMAIL MOCKED]' prefix when RESEND_API_KEY not configured. Verified in backend.err.log: New Booking Request and Booking Confirmed emails logged.

booking_request_page.details: Form with date, time, duration, payment method (cash/bank_transfer), notes, disclaimer. Creates pending booking. Success page shows next steps.

helper_bookings_api.details: Returns bookings where user is the helper, includes customer name and payment preference

accept_booking.details: Helper can accept booking, triggers email notification to customer, updates status to confirmed

decline_booking.details: Helper can decline booking with confirmation prompt

complete_booking.details: Confirmed bookings can be marked as completed

dashboard_booking_requests_tab.details: Shows pending count badge, booking cards with accept/decline buttons, payment preference badges

mobile_responsive.details: Homepage and booking page render correctly on mobile, form elements accessible
